generations.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct: compute parity of permutation
    # sorted array
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # position mapping: where does each element need to go?
    # permutation p where p[i] = j means a[i] should go to position j
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[x] for x in a]
    
    # compute parity
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += cycle_len - 1
    
    if parity % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, find permutation parity
    # sorted array gives us target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = where v should go (0-indexed)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # Find parity of permutation
    # perm[i] = pos[a[i]] (where element at position i should go)
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0  # 0 = even
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length L contributes L-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    if parity == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted array gives target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = position in sorted array
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # permutation: where does element at position i need to go?
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    # compute parity of permutation
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0  # 0 = even
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length k contributes k-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct: compute parity of permutation
    # sorted array
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # position mapping: where does each element need to go?
    # permutation p where p[i] = j means a[i] should go to position j
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[x] for x in a]
    
    # compute parity
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += cycle_len - 1
    
    if parity % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, find permutation parity
    # sorted array gives us target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = where v should go (0-indexed)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # Find parity of permutation
    # perm[i] = pos[a[i]] (where element at position i should go)
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0  # 0 = even
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length L contributes L-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    if parity == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v > 1 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted array gives target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = position in sorted array
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # permutation: where does element at position i need to go?
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    # compute parity of permutation
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0  # 0 = even
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            # cycle of length k contributes k-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
